v1.6.0.summary: Security hardening, ML feature alignment, centralized logging, secrets panel UI, feedback loop, and .dotenvyignore support

completed_tasks.title: Fix engines.vscode version mismatch
completed_tasks.description: Bumped engines.vscode from ^1.74.0 to ^1.110.0 to match @types/vscode.

completed_tasks.title: Rewrite llmAnalyzer.ts — SecretStorage + variableName
completed_tasks.description: Replaced hardcoded EXTENSION_SHARED_SECRET with vscode.SecretStorage. Fixed machineId, timestamp, and variableName passthrough.

completed_tasks.title: Build featureExtractor.ts — carbon copy of Python
completed_tasks.description: Fixed feature count 31→35, entropy /6.0→/8.0, added 4 missing feature functions.

completed_tasks.title: Centralized Logger
completed_tasks.description: Replaced 94 console calls across 21 files with logger.ts (OutputChannel, timestamps, context tags, log levels).

completed_tasks.title: Secrets Panel UI (SecretsPanel.ts)
completed_tasks.description: Full WebviewPanel with filter/search, View/Move/.env/Not-a-Secret buttons, color-coded confidence.

completed_tasks.title: FeedbackManager — collect training data
completed_tasks.description: Collects confirmed/false-positive labels with 35-feature vectors, stores locally, sends to Railway /extension/feedback.

completed_tasks.title: .dotenvyignore support
completed_tasks.description: Full gitignore-syntax glob matching integrated into SecretDetector. Init command + right-click add to ignore.

completed_tasks.title: Delete secretScanner.ts (legacy monolith)
completed_tasks.description: Confirmed SecretDetector covers all functionality. Updated scanSecrets.ts. Zero compile errors.

completed_tasks.title: Reconstruct 5 missing .ts source files
completed_tasks.description: Reverse-engineered from compiled .js: setupFlutterEnvironment, scanFlutterEnvironment, toggleRealtimeScanning, mlLearner, flutterEnvironmentScanner.

completed_tasks.title: Security audit — gitleaks
completed_tasks.description: Ran gitleaks on full git history. 25 findings — all confirmed placeholder values. No real secrets exposed.

v1.7.0.theme: Close the feedback loop — make the model actually learn
v1.7.0.context: v1.6.0 built the full pipeline: FeedbackManager collects data + sends to Railway. Now wire the server side, persist the model, and improve training quality.

tasks.title: Fix /stats test assertion
tasks.description: GET /stats returns HTTP 200 but test checks wrong response keys. Update assertion in test_local.py.

tasks.title: Wire /extension/feedback endpoint on Railway
tasks.description: FeedbackManager already sends data. Railway needs /extension/feedback to accept batches and call model.train().
tasks.acceptance_criteria: POST /extension/feedback returns 200, model loss decreases after 10+ samples

tasks.title: Fix .dotenvy/** false positives
tasks.description: History JSON files still appear in scan results. Verify glob pattern works and add analytics-cache.json explicitly.

tasks.title: Persist Trained Model Across Railway Deploys
tasks.description: ML model weights lost on every redeploy. Mount Railway persistent volume at /data/.
implementation_options: Save model as BYTEA in PostgreSQL
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Model trained before deploy survives a Railway redeploy

tasks.title: SSE Streaming in VS Code Panel
tasks.description: Wire /extension/analyze/stream to panel UI with animated progress bar.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Panel shows 5-stage animated progress during analysis

tasks.title: Implement Proper Backpropagation
tasks.description: _simple_gradient_update() only updates classifier layer. Implement real backprop through all layers + Adam optimizer.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: Training loss decreases consistently across 10+ epochs

tasks.title: Expand Training Dataset to 150+ Samples
tasks.description: Current: 30 samples. Add Azure, GCP, Twilio, npm, Docker Hub, PyPI, Cloudflare, Datadog, HuggingFace tokens.

tasks.title: Upgrade Major Dependencies
tasks.acceptance_criteria: npm run compile passes, npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities

tasks.title: Update CHANGELOG and Publish v1.7.0
tasks.description: Document changes, bump version, vsce publish.

success_criteria: POST /extension/feedback accepted and model loss decreases
.dotenvy/** files never appear in scan results
Panel shows live streaming confidence updates
